request: Rank the 4 best Toyota Supra generations overall across the full production run. Use 4 different generations when available, with one representative version from each generation. If the model has fewer than 4 true generations, use the most important era-defining versions across its history.
title: RANKING EVERY TOYOTA SUPRA GENERATION
close_narration: So, which Supra generation gets your vote?
order_rationale: Ordered from the earliest to the latest generation to showcase the evolution of the Toyota Supra.

entries.name: A40 Celica Supra
entries.label: THE ORIGIN
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 1979 at $10,000 with 116 horsepower, the A40 Celica Supra laid the foundation for Toyota's performance legacy. Today, clean examples trade around $7K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $7K.
entries.narration: Debuting in 1979 at $10,000 with 116 horsepower, the A40 Celica Supra laid the foundation for Toyota's performance legacy. Today, clean examples trade around $7K.

entries.name: A60 Supra
entries.label: THE EVOLUTION
entries.one_line_fact: In 1982, the A60 Supra arrived at $12,000, boasting 145 horsepower and a sleek redesign that turned heads. Today, clean examples trade around $21K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $21K.
entries.narration: In 1982, the A60 Supra arrived at $12,000, boasting 145 horsepower and a sleek redesign that turned heads. Today, clean examples trade around $21K.

entries.name: A70 Supra Turbo
entries.label: THE TURBO ERA
entries.one_line_fact: Then, in 1987, the A70 Supra Turbo hit the scene at $18,000, delivering 230 horsepower and turbocharged thrills. Today, clean examples trade around $15K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $15K.
entries.narration: Then, in 1987, the A70 Supra Turbo hit the scene at $18,000, delivering 230 horsepower and turbocharged thrills. Today, clean examples trade around $15K.

entries.name: A80 Supra Twin Turbo
entries.label: THE ICON
entries.one_line_fact: At number one, the 1993 A80 Supra Twin Turbo launched at $40,000, packing 320 horsepower and becoming a legend. Today, clean examples trade around $160K.
entries.current_value_note: Recent Cars & Bids examples trade around $160K.
entries.narration: At number one, the 1993 A80 Supra Twin Turbo launched at $40,000, packing 320 horsepower and becoming a legend. Today, clean examples trade around $160K.
